name: Arli

skills.name: Falling Leaves
skills.description: Basic Attack hits place marks on the target. At max marks, damage is dealt to them.Using skills grants a follow-up Basic Attack.Gains Move Speed and reduces attack interval while parasol is away.

skills.name: Maple Dance
skills.description: Knocks down nearby projectiles within a certain range and deals 2 strikes ofdamage to the enemy.

skills.name: Autumn Storm
skills.description: Knocks back enemies in the target area and deals damage

tips: Arli (Marksman): Tier A on international ranked — 47.01% WR.
Build core: Boots of Dexterity, Sparkforged Dagger, Doomsday.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 47.01%, pick 0.79%, ban 0.36%, popularity tier A.

faqs.question: Is Arli good in current season?
faqs.answer: Arli is Tier A Marksman with 47.01% win rate, 0.79% pick rate, and 0.36% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Arli build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Boots of Dexterity, Sparkforged Dagger, Doomsday, Daybreaker's Virtue, Eternity Blade, Sunchaser. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Arli?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Arli: Donghuang, Daji. Arli is strong into Kaizer, Angela.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Kaizer, Angela. Countered by: Donghuang, Daji.
